content.text: How can I securely connect to an SMTP server using either 465 (SSL) or 587 (TLS)?
What happens if an unsupported port is passed to this function?
If the port does not match 465 or 587 (or their string equivalents), `session` will remain undefined outside of its initialization scope, which would cause a `NameError` when calling `login()`.
That makes sense; I should definitely add input validation for the ports.
